title: Dark Fantasy: Orcish Depths
description: Adds a deep orcish cave-citadel. Rough mines, dangerous parkour, lava chasms, and a bloody arena. Will you make it out alive from the lair of the green threat?
body:
# **Description**
Adds a deep, multi-level orcish cave-citadel, filled with brute force and chaos. Starting from a small orc camp on the surface, you will encounter seven diverse locations: dark mines, dangerous parkour sections, lava chasms, hanging orc structures, and a bloody arena where you must either fight waves of enemies or find a way to escape!

## **Key Features**
- **A True Challenge:** Thanks to integration with DungeonZ, these dungeons become a fair and honest test. Breaking and placing most blocks is forbidden inside - you won’t be able to “dig” your way to the end. Only your combat skills and ingenuity will help you survive!
- **Hordes of Savage Orcs:** The depths are crawling with brutal orcs and goblins from Wandering Orcs. Aggressive, numerous and bloodthirsty - they will hunt you down without mercy.
- **Immersive Orc Lair Atmosphere:** Descend into a filthy and chaotic orc citadel filled with crude buildings, hanging chunks of meat, piles of bones, skulls and overgrown underground vegetation.
- **Epic Finale:** Deep in the heart of the citadel awaits a powerful orc boss with advanced combat AI. Defeating him will not be easy, but the valuable rewards - unique orcish weapons, armor and rare loot - will make worth it.

## **Required Mods**

### **Forge/NeoForge**
The following mods are required:

- [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)
- [Dungeonz](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeonz)
- [Wandering Orc](https://modrinth.com/mod/wandering-orc)

_Unfortunately, no equivalent of DungeonZ for Forge has been released yet, so the mod currently works only through the Sinitra Connector._

### **Fabric**
The following mods are required:

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Dungeonz](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeonz)
- [Wandering Orc](https://modrinth.com/mod/wandering-orc)


_Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks_
